semantic_invariants.signup_domains: restrictions apply only to absent users; configured domains are trimmed, lowercased, hostname-validated, and exact-matched
semantic_invariants.verification: missing is forbidden; expired and wrong attempts delete the identifier; matching delete must affect exactly one row; every attempt is one-use
semantic_invariants.existing_user: getUserByEmail-visible users only update emailVerified and never execute Stripe
semantic_invariants.provisioned_user: a user without linked accounts who has both a pending invite and membership follows createUser, fills a missing provisioned name, and truthfully queues Stripe when configured
semantic_invariants.new_user: create a Cap NanoID user; pending invite leaves active/default organization empty; otherwise create My Organization, owner membership, and all source-ID aliases
semantic_invariants.stripe_failure_boundary: createUser database state commits before Stripe; no mobile key is returned or minted while the protected effect is pending
semantic_invariants.mobile_keys: delete every prior source=mobile key and mint one UUID; unrelated extension/desktop/developer keys survive
semantic_invariants.request_session: anonymous users receive a deployment-origin /login redirect preserving path/query plus google/workos and WorkOS organization propagation
semantic_invariants.redirect_allowlist: only cap://auth and the exact exp+cap Expo development-client forms are accepted before credentials are appended
semantic_invariants.revoke_auth: middleware selects any 36-byte second authorization segment before handler parsing; handler then requires case-insensitive Bearer and a nonempty second segment
semantic_invariants.revoke_effect: delete by bearer token identity and return success even when no row is affected

provider_orchestration.email: fixed-size AES-GCM ciphertext-only auth_delivery_provider_handoffs_v1 row committed with the challenge; success remains provider_execution-gated
provider_orchestration.stripe: immutable user-bound legacy_mobile_session_stripe_effects_v1 pending intent; existing-user update branch remains provider-free
